mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t_menu.menu_id,t_menu.menu_name,t_menu.up_menu_id,t_menu.menu_order,t_menu.menu_icon,t_menu.func_id, t_func.func_url,t_func.func_url_js,t_func.func_url_css,t_menu.i18n_key FROM admin_sm_auth_reco t_reco JOIN ( SELECT t_user.user_id user_id, t_user.org_id org_id,t_user.dpt_id dpt_id,t_rolerel.role_id role_id FROM admin_sm_user t_user LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t_roelrel.user_id , t_roelrel.role_id FROM admin_sm_user_role_rel t_roelrel JOIN admin_sm_role t_role on t_roelrel.role_id= t_role.role_id WHERE t_role.role_sts='A' ) t_rolerel ON t_user.user_id=t_rolerel.user_id ${ew.customsqlsegment} ) t_authobj ON( (t_reco.authobj_type='U' AND t_reco.authobj_id = t_authobj.user_id) OR (t_reco.authobj_type='R' AND t_reco.authobj_id = t_authobj.role_id) OR (t_reco.authobj_type='G' AND t_reco.authobj_id = t_authobj.org_id) OR (t_reco.authobj_type='D' AND t_reco.authobj_id = t_authobj.dpt_id) ) JOIN admin_sm_menu t_menu ON(t_reco.authres_type ='M' AND t_reco.authres_id=t_menu.menu_id) LEFT JOIN admin_sm_busi_func t_func ON(t_menu.func_id = t_func.func_id) ORDER BY t_menu.up_menu_id,t_menu.menu_order ASC

SELECT m.*,f.func_url, (SELECT m1.menu_name FROM admin_sm_menu m1 WHERE m1.menu_id = m.up_menu_id) AS up_menu_name FROM admin_sm_menu m LEFT JOIN admin_sm_busi_func f ON (m.func_id = f.func_id) WHERE m.menu_id=#{menuId}

SELECT b.menu_id AS id, b.menu_name,b.up_menu_id, 'm' AS menu_type,b.menu_id FROM (SELECT menu_id,menu_name,up_menu_id FROM admin_sm_menu m WHERE m.sys_id=#{sysid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY m.menu_order) b

SELECT t.contr_id AS id, t.contr_name AS menu_name, m.menu_id AS up_menu_id, 'c' AS menu_type, m.menu_id FROM admin_sm_res_contr t LEFT JOIN admin_sm_menu m ON m.func_id = t.func_id WHERE m.sys_id=#{sysid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT r.AUTH_RECO_ID, r.AUTHRES_ID, r.authres_type, m.menu_name AS node_name, m.up_menu_id AS up_tree_id, m.menu_order AS order_column FROM admin_sm_auth_reco r INNER JOIN admin_sm_menu m ON r.authres_id = m.menu_id WHERE r.authobj_id = #{id}
and r.data_tenant_id = #{dataTenantId}

select m1.menu_id, m1.menu_name, m1.up_menu_id, m2.menu_name as up_menu_name, m1.func_id, case when m1.menu_id = #{lastMenuId} then 1 else 0 end as mark from admin_sm_menu m1 LEFT JOIN admin_sm_menu m2 ON m1.up_menu_id = m2.menu_id ${ew.customSqlSegment} order by m1.menu_order
